Venting I would first like to start off by saying that,
0.024 / 4
if I could,
0.018 / 7
I would not want to die or

0.005 / 5

0.002 / 11

anything besides consistent despair.
0.034 / 9
On the outside, I may look successful.
0.009 / 31
I earned a college degree at the age of 18, and I ve worked for UNC, one of the most prestigious public universities in the United States.
0.001 / 11
I have my own apartment at the age of 20,
0.003 / 14
and I have a loving family and a puppy who keeps me company.
-0.017 / 37
I am also supposed to be a good Christian girl, and I used to attend the local Coptic church regularly. Beyond my sunny exterior, like I said earlier, I only have dread.
0.019 / 24
I have hated the fact that I have these mean voices in my head telling me that no one truly cares about me.
-0.001 / 30
I have hated the fact that I was so insecure about my weight, and have tried to starve myself to stay skinny: if I ate,
0.002 / 17
I would try anything in my power to regurgitate the food that I ate.
-0.004 / 32
I have hated the fact that I have stopped attending classes at UNC, going to church, going to therapy, and going to work like I used to.
-0.001 / 27
All I can bear to do now is to sell my own body for work, and drink to ease the pain. The reason why?

-0.294 / 2
Suicidal
-0.088
Thoughts
-0.001
and
0.085 / 13
Venting I would first like to start off by saying that,
-0.002 / 4
if I could,
0.002 / 7
I would not want to die or
0.007 / 4
cease my existence I
0.007 / 5
would want to be happy
0.015 / 11
and not feel like things are crashing down on me,
0.054 / 5
but I can t feel
0.075 / 5
anything besides consistent despair.
0.008 / 9
On the outside, I may look successful.
-0.006 / 31
I earned a college degree at the age of 18, and I ve worked for UNC, one of the most prestigious public universities in the United States.
-0.003 / 11
I have my own apartment at the age of 20,
-0.002 / 14
and I have a loving family and a puppy who keeps me company.
0.019 / 37
I am also supposed to be a good Christian girl, and I used to attend the local Coptic church regularly. Beyond my sunny exterior, like I said earlier, I only have dread.
0.017 / 24
I have hated the fact that I have these mean voices in my head telling me that no one truly cares about me.
0.006 / 30
I have hated the fact that I was so insecure about my weight, and have tried to starve myself to stay skinny: if I ate,
0.005 / 17
I would try anything in my power to regurgitate the food that I ate.
-0.002 / 32
I have hated the fact that I have stopped attending classes at UNC, going to church, going to therapy, and going to work like I used to.
-0.0 / 27
All I can bear to do now is to sell my own body for work, and drink to ease the pain. The reason why?
-0.0 / 242
That s the only way I have known to ever feel loved. I was raped since the age of 16 until just recently, and every single day I subconsciously have felt that if no one loves how I look or calls me beautiful that I am worthless. You may ask why I cannot go to my parents or anybody from my church to ask for help. The thing is, I feel as if I don t deserve their help. My parents did not choose to have a daughter like me who has went through so much. People from my church are good people while I am a wretched human being who has done so many horrible things. Besides, I am sure they know that I am not like them. I do all sorts of evil sins, so I would definitely be far from being a good child of God. I am tormented daily. In the morning, by my lack of desire to get up and be productive. At night, by my consistent nightmares. It is all just torture. If I can disappear from existence and not have to experience the pain of death, I would have done it. Right now, I am just trying to decide if disappearing from existence is worth experiencing the pain of death.

-0.0 / 242
That s the only way I have known to ever feel loved. I was raped since the age of 16 until just recently, and every single day I subconsciously have felt that if no one loves how I look or calls me beautiful that I am worthless. You may ask why I cannot go to my parents or anybody from my church to ask for help. The thing is, I feel as if I don t deserve their help. My parents did not choose to have a daughter like me who has went through so much. People from my church are good people while I am a wretched human being who has done so many horrible things. Besides, I am sure they know that I am not like them. I do all sorts of evil sins, so I would definitely be far from being a good child of God. I am tormented daily. In the morning, by my lack of desire to get up and be productive. At night, by my consistent nightmares. It is all just torture. If I can disappear from existence and not have to experience the pain of death, I would have done it. Right now, I am just trying to decide if disappearing from existence is worth experiencing the pain of death.

I earned a college degree at the age of 18, and I ve worked for UNC, one of the most prestigious public universities in the United States.
-0.005 / 11
I have my own apartment at the age of 20,
-0.007 / 14
and I have a loving family and a puppy who keeps me company.
-0.024 / 37
I am also supposed to be a good Christian girl, and I used to attend the local Coptic church regularly. Beyond my sunny exterior, like I said earlier, I only have dread.
-0.012 / 24
I have hated the fact that I have these mean voices in my head telling me that no one truly cares about me.
-0.014 / 30
I have hated the fact that I was so insecure about my weight, and have tried to starve myself to stay skinny: if I ate,
-0.007 / 17
I would try anything in my power to regurgitate the food that I ate.
-0.005 / 32
I have hated the fact that I have stopped attending classes at UNC, going to church, going to therapy, and going to work like I used to.
-0.001 / 27
All I can bear to do now is to sell my own body for work, and drink to ease the pain. The reason why?
-0.0 / 104
That s the only way I have known to ever feel loved. I was raped since the age of 16 until just recently, and every single day I subconsciously have felt that if no one loves how I look or calls me beautiful that I am worthless. You may ask why I cannot go to my parents or anybody from my church to ask for help. The thing is, I feel as if I don t deserve their help. My parents did not choose to have a daughter like me who has went through so much.
-0.0 / 138
People from my church are good people while I am a wretched human being who has done so many horrible things. Besides, I am sure they know that I am not like them. I do all sorts of evil sins, so I would definitely be far from being a good child of God. I am tormented daily. In the morning, by my lack of desire to get up and be productive. At night, by my consistent nightmares. It is all just torture. If I can disappear from existence and not have to experience the pain of death, I would have done it. Right now, I am just trying to decide if disappearing from existence is worth experiencing the pain of death.

if I could,
-0.004 / 7
I would not want to die or
-0.004 / 4
cease my existence I
-0.003 / 5
would want to be happy
-0.003 / 11
and not feel like things are crashing down on me,
-0.009 / 5

-0.015 / 5
anything besides consistent despair.
